SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

Interface RegistrationCI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, Remote, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
All Known Implementing Classes:
BrokerRegistrationInboundPort, ClientRegistrationOutboundPort, RegistrationConnector
public interface RegistrationCI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
The interface RegistrationCI is offered to users to register on the publication/subscription system and manage their subscriptions to channels.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-20

Author:
Jacques Malenfant

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    The enumeration RegistrationClass defines the basic registration classes for the publish/subscribe system.
    static interface 
    RegistrationCI.RegistrationClassI
    The interface RegistrationClassI must be implemented by all registration class enumerations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    channelAuthorised(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for receptionPortURI, otherwise false.
    boolean
    channelExist(String channel)
    return true if channel exists, otherwise false.
    boolean
    modifyFilter(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    modify the filter placed on channel to filter.
    String
    modifyServiceClass(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
    String
    register(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    register on the publication/subscription system passing the URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI on which the user component will receive its messages; the method returns an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI on which the user component will publish its messages.
    boolean
    registered(String receptionPortURI)
    return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered, otherwise false.
    boolean
    registered(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
    void
    subscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    subscribe to channel with filter filter.
    boolean
    subscribed(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    return true if receptionPortURI has subscribed to channel, otherwise false.
    void
    unregister(String receptionPortURI)
    unregister from the publication/subscription system.
    void
    unsubscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    unsubscribe from channel.

  • Method Details

    • registered

      boolean registered(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has already been registered, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • registered

      boolean registered(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the registration class.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • register

      String register(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      register on the publication/subscription system passing the URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI on which the user component will receive its messages; the method returns an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI on which the user component will publish its messages.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   registered(receptionPortURI)
 post   registered(receptionPortURI, rc)
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the required registration class.
      Returns:
      an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • modifyServiceClass

      String modifyServiceClass(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   registered(receptionPortURI, rc)
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the required registration class.
      Returns:
      an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • unregister

      void unregister(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      unregister from the publication/subscription system.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   !registered(receptionPortURI)
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • channelExist

      boolean channelExist(String channel) throws Exception
      return true if channel exists, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of a potential channel.
      Returns:
      true if channel exists, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • channelAuthorised

      boolean channelAuthorised(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      return true if the use of channel is authorised for receptionPortURI, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of a potential channel.
      Returns:
      true if the use of channel is authorised for receptionPortURI, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • subscribed

      boolean subscribed(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      return true if receptionPortURI has subscribed to channel, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing and authorised channel.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has subscribed to channel, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • subscribe

      void subscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws Exception
      subscribe to channel with filter filter.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    filter != null
 post   subscribed(receptionPortURI, channel)
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter that accepts the message the component wants to receive.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • unsubscribe

      void unsubscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      unsubscribe from channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   !subscribed(receptionPortURI, channel)
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • modifyFilter

      boolean modifyFilter(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws Exception
      modify the filter placed on channel to filter.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    filter != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter that accepts the message the component wants to receive.
      Returns:
      true if the modification has been performed, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
